name: Sloppy Joe Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large nonstick skillet, brown the meat over medium heat for 8-10 minutes or until no longer pink, stirring occasionally.
3. Pour off any drippings.
4. Stir corn, barbecue sauce, and green onions into the meat; heat through.
5. Place the prepared pizza crust on a baking sheet.
6. Spoon the meat mixture over the top of the crust.
7. Sprinkle cheese evenly over the meat.
8. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
9. Cut into 8 wedges.
